mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS diary_id , d.content , d.created_at , de.emotion AS emotion_name FROM diary d LEFT JOIN diary_emotion de ON d.id = de.diary_id WHERE d.id = #{diaryId} AND d.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT d.id AS diary_id , d.user_id , d.created_at FROM diary d JOIN forest f ON d.forest_id = f.id JOIN shared_forest sf ON f.id = sf.forest_id WHERE f.id = #{forestId} AND sf.user_id = #{userId}
